items.definition_en: An arm is a part of your body that connects your shoulder to your hand.
items.example_en: She raised her arm to ask a question.

items.definition_en: A leg is a part of your body you use to stand and walk.
items.example_en: He hurt his leg while running.

items.definition_en: A hand is the part at the end of your arm that you use to hold things.
items.example_en: Please wash your hand before eating.

items.definition_en: A foot is the part of your body at the end of your leg.
items.example_en: My foot hurts after walking so much.

items.definition_en: A head is the top part of your body with your face and brain.
items.example_en: He wore a hat on his head.

items.definition_en: A face is the front part of your head with your eyes, nose, and mouth.
items.example_en: She smiled with a happy face.

items.definition_en: An eye is the part of your body that you use to see.
items.example_en: He has blue eyes.

items.definition_en: An ear is the part of your body that you use to hear.
items.example_en: She wore earrings in each ear.

items.definition_en: A mouth is the part of your face that you use to eat and speak.
items.example_en: He opened his mouth to talk.

items.definition_en: A nose is the part of your face that you use to smell and breathe.
items.example_en: She has a small nose.

items.definition_en: A back is the part of your body behind your chest.
items.example_en: His back hurts after lifting the box.

items.definition_en: A shoulder is the part of your body where your arm joins your body.
items.example_en: She carried a bag on her shoulder.

items.definition_en: A knee is the middle joint of your leg.
items.example_en: He bent his knee to tie his shoe.

items.definition_en: An elbow is the joint in the middle of your arm.
items.example_en: She leaned on her elbow while reading.

items.definition_en: A neck is the part of your body between your head and shoulders.
items.example_en: He wore a scarf around his neck.

items.definition_en: A finger is one of the five parts at the end of your hand.
items.example_en: She hurt her finger while cooking.

items.definition_en: A toe is one of the five parts at the end of your foot.
items.example_en: He stepped on my toe by accident.

items.definition_en: A stomach is the front part of your body below your chest.
items.example_en: My stomach is full.

items.definition_en: A chest is the front part of your body between your neck and your stomach.
items.example_en: He crossed his arms over his chest.

items.definition_en: A hip is the part of your body at the side above your leg.
items.example_en: She put her hands on her hips.
